name: Nutty Coconut Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients: Combine 2 cups of bread flour and 1 teaspoon of salt in a bowl.
2. Add wet ingredients: Stir in 1 tablespoon of butter, 1 tablespoon of cream of coconut, 1/4 cup of flaked coconut, 3 tablespoons of pecans, and 3 tablespoons of walnuts into the dry mixture until well combined.
3. Incorporate yeast: Mix in 2 teaspoons of yeast with the wet ingredients.
4. Combine all ingredients: Gradually add the coconut milk to the mixture, stirring continuously until a dough forms.
5. Prepare for baking: Place the dough on a greased baking sheet or in a loaf pan lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake: Follow your oven's regular baking cycle.
Note: If desired, substitute the coconut milk with water.
